---
title: "Ash (Fraxinus excelsior) — Trees"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

**Family:** [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)
**Genus:** [*Fraxinus*](/trees/genus/fraxinus.html)

# Ash (*Fraxinus excelsior*)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 62 - Ash](../62.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 63 - Ash](../63.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |

- [Tree 62 - Ash](../62.html)
- [Tree 63 - Ash](../63.html)
